description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a central open courtyard, surrounded by a minimalist garden with several palm trees. The structure features clean, rectangular lines and a predominantly white and gray color palette, with large glass windows and sliding doors opening onto the courtyard and exterior. The front entrance is accessed by a short staircase leading to a small porch area, flanked by a low black fence and a wooden gate. The roof has a large rectangular cutout, providing natural light to the courtyard and interior living spaces. The landscaping is sparse and geometric, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The overall design is sleek, functional, and emphasizes indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a central open courtyard, minimalist landscaping, and large glass windows. The structure is predominantly white and gray, with clean lines and a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, low black fence, wooden gate, and landscaped garden with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large central courtyard opening, and grouped palm trees along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open courtyard, large glass doors, and minimal window arrangement on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with driveway access, black fencing, and a clear view of the flat roof and central courtyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and courtyard-facing windows
